title: 10 best herbal tinctures for chronic bronchitis
description: Wolf's foot fern tinctures helps with chronic bronchitis because its potent compounds have been shown to reduce inflammation in the respiratory tract, alleviating symptoms such as coughing and wheezing. The tincture's anti-inflammatory properties also help to relax bronchial smooth muscle, improving airflow and reducing congestion.
